reviews.review_description: Love playing this game with my family. Please make more maps, enemies, and a progression system.

I keep having an issue when playing multiplayer, after the game finishes, sometimes i cant pick up any bow from the weapons rack because the bow is completely missing and i need to restart the game. Sometimes it says i have disconnected but i can still hear my team mates and things get weird and not synchronised anymore so we both need to restart the game. The fact we need to restart is the worst thing because we need to call each other to communicate the room number. Apart of that its fun.

developer_response.body: Hey thanks for the nice review! Sorry for that annoying bug... we will see if we can recreate it and address the problem.

reviews.review_title: Dont buy this. It has no support
reviews.review_description: June24 2025. Tournament still doesnt work correctly.  Has been broken for 6 months.   It does not keep leader scores.   Feb 2026 Tournament still not working.  Sad I loved this game.

developer_response.body:
Hi Calypsoleu, 
We haven't had any other reports of the tournament not working, but we'll look into it and try to get it fixed and get you back into the game as soon as we can!

reviews.review_description: This game is so fun to play but my arrow keeps doing weird things which throws my aim off but could someone PLEASE let me know more games EXACTLY like this multi-player co-op that I can download

developer_response.body: Thanks for the kind review Perry Bird! Strange that the arrows are not flying accurately for you. We've not heard other reports of that and can't reproduce here... but we'll keep an eye on it.

reviews.review_description: Really underrated game good visuals, and is really addicting.

developer_response.body: Hi Midway_gt, thanks very much for checking out Battle Bows, and for this nice review!

reviews.review_description: There is no more updates and game has no players if looking for a b9w game find something else. Hey devs are yall planning on updating this game

developer_response.body: Hi Ninjakid -- sorry to hear that you haven't been able to find games!

reviews.review_description:
This is such a fun game. I have the Shadow Shot from Dead Eye VR, I wanted to try it with this game, it actually works, not perfect, there is a learning curve with that bow in this app, but it works great and I love that I can use my bow with it. 
The graphics look awesome, I like how the balloons explode, it's not that hard but it's not also that easy. I play other arrow games with my bow, but I'm glad I found this game too.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review MaryVReds! Really happy to hear that you're enjoying the game!

reviews.review_description: I keep looking for games like this because of how much I enjoy this. It took a while to get used to everything, but once you are good- it can be so much fun to lock in on. Highly recommend buying- and having your friends buy. 💯

developer_response.body: Thanks for your wonderful review Dylan!! We really appreciate it!

reviews.review_description:
Don't be misled by the highlights, they are deceptive and not fun.
I really regret buying this idiotic game
Children's stuff, not suitable for adult

Don't buy, Don't buy

Only worth 1 cent US dollar

There are only a few types of enemies and their reactions are slow and unexciting. It is only suitable for children aged 5 years old.

This is an unfair trade in cash cows.

developer_response.body: Hey there HKRaymondNG, we're sorry to hear that you didn't enjoy the game. Thank you nonetheless for giving it a try, and for letting us know your thoughts about it.

reviews.review_description:
Personally, I love this game and it shows after being able to get 1st on both leaderboards but there is a few things to change, (which is to be expected because the game has only been out for a week.)
 
1. Some of the hit-boxes can feel really janky. An example is the double bomb guy and his bombs have really weird hit-boxes which is basically the fuse and no other part of the bomb. Also some of the bosses have weird hit-boxes like the purple and blue bosses.

2. There needs to be more clarification on the leaderboards. It needs to say if it’s in the region or the world and a nice quality of life change would be showing what element the people on the leaderboards used in that run.

3. There are a few bugs in the game like when the Green guys spawn in sometimes they float and don’t go to the ground and a few others that would be nice if squashed.
 
Overall, this is a great game that is easy to play but very hard to master and every run feels different. The art styIe is unique and different to all other bow games on the market. I love this game and I just want to see it succeed, so I hope the devs keep updating the game and making fresh content.

That is all, thank you for the amazing game! 

Edit: The hit-boxes have been fixed and other things have been improved.  :)

reviews.review_title: Very fun! But I have one complaint
reviews.review_description: The only complaint I have is the bow feels very weak! I draw the arrow all the way back but the arrow doesn’t really shoot fast and has a huge drop. I wish it felt more like a real bow.

I play a game called in death unchained, which is probably by far the best archery came out there. While this is a pretty fun game to play, the mechanics are a little odd and, there are points where the game is so lagging that the little balloon guy I’m trying to shoot, has already moved halfway across the screen before my arrow even seems to have left my bow. It’s still has a lot of fun, but there are times where the lag just gets more than frustrating.

I like this game, really well made. Its fun to jump in. Bow feels good, good graphics, fun gameplay. So why only 3 stars? It needs more maps! Only one map available!!  Elven Assasin for example has 9 maps. Arrows has three worlds with three destinations each. 19,99 is too much for one map...

developer_response.body: Thanks for playing Battle Bows, we really appreciate your support! We're excited to let you know that our Bow Showdown Update is now available, and features the brand-new Winter Keep Map. This snow-covered map features new enemy approaches and new locations for healing targets and barrels. Along with this awesome new map, the updates includes the Bow Showdown event, a new weapon, new enemies, a new boss, and more. Give it a try and tell us what you think!

reviews.review_description: The game is easy to learn and very fun. Got to Wave 3 and my second try.
I love the way that you can just use all the different powers

I'd keep getting the could not to connect.... please restart  with a valid connection.... restarted headset... restarted wifi router and modem... Uninstall reinstall... disconnect and reconnect wifi through headset.... can't play with friends who got the game for me. I'd be angry if I spent money and the thing didn't work... and it's a gift.

reviews.review_title: SUPER FUN just two bad things
reviews.review_description: Really fun just you need the teammates it's really easy for new people to play but any time there's a new enemy they should put something to inform you on what the enemy can do

developer_response.body: So glad you're having fun playing Battle Bows! We appreciate your review and feedback. As a note, you may want to read up on enemy tips and tricks before you play. We've provided a helpful book in the starting tent that has information about every enemy and boss in the game. Try picking it up and flipping through the pages. There's a lot of great information there that will take your game to the next level.

reviews.review_description:
Connected to the internet, game still won’t work.

Sent email to costumer service. Game still won’t work.

developer_response.body: Sorry to hear you've had troubles connecting. We're investigating internally, but if you could give us a few more details, it would be very helpful. What time of day and date did this occur? Is it still occurring? Is your Wi-Fi connected to your Oculus device? Which Oculus device are you using to play Battle Bows? Were you trying to play a solo, hosted, or quickplay match? We'd love to help you track the issue down. Please contact us at support@wimogames.com.

reviews.review_description: Is awesome and the fact that they had no upadates suprises me

Played this with friends and solo,
Fun game, would be good to have a crossbow option to saves the left arm ache from holding the bow 😄 other then that a great app! I look forward to more maps and maybe a zombie wave in the future updates
5*****
